channel.title: Creative/Design on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Creative/Design on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Adobe's Project Indigo Brings AI Photo Critique to iOS
item.description: Adobe adds AI‑driven tools to its iOS camera, Project Indigo, delivering photo critique, object removal, depth‑of‑field and style new transfer.

item.title: Ikea Design Chief Reveals His Personal Product Favorites
item.description: Ikea's design chief Johan Ejdemo shares which products he personally owns and why, revealing insights into the brand's aesthetic and functional philosophy.

item.title: Hainbach: The Maestro of Experimental Music & Tech Alchemy
item.description: Explore how experimental composer Hainbach blends lab gear, vintage synths, and plugins to create groundbreaking music. Dive into his workflow, tools, and philosophy.

item.title: How to Watch Knicks Parade on NYC Traffic Cams—No Shutdowns!
item.description: NYC’s DOT lets artist Morry Kolman livestream the Knicks parade via traffic cams—here’s how it works, the tech behind it, and why this time is different.

item.title: Adobe Unleashes AI Revolution
item.description: Adobe's Redesigned AI Studio: Revolutionizing Creative Workflows with Firefly AI assistant. Discover new features and how they're changing the way you work with AI-powered design tools.

item.title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
item.description: Adobe launches public beta for AI Assistants in Creative Cloud, integrating AI-powered chatbots in popular apps for designers and editors.
